parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all();

return items.map(item => ({
  json: {
    domain: 'wellness',
    metric_date: item.json.id,
    source: 'intervals_icu',
    metrics: {
      sleep_secs: item.json.sleepSecs,
      sleep_score: item.json.sleepScore,
      sleep_quality: item.json.sleepQuality,
      deep_sleep_secs: item.json.DeepSleep,
      light_sleep_secs: item.json.LightSleep,
      rem_sleep_secs: item.json.REMSleep,
      avg_sleeping_hr: item.json.avgSleepingHR,
      resting_hr: item.json.restingHR,
      hrv: item.json.hrv,
      hrv_sdnn: item.json.hrvSDNN,
      spo2: item.json.spO2,
      readiness: item.json.readiness,
      respiration: item.json.respiration,
      vo2max: item.json.vo2max,
      steps: item.json.steps,
      ctl: item.json.ctl,
      atl: item.json.atl,
      ramp_rate: item.json.rampRate,
      weight: item.json.weight,
      soreness: item.json.soreness,
      fatigue: item.json.fatigue,
      stress: item.json.stress,
      mood: item.json.mood,
      motivation: item.json.motivation,
      sport_info: item.json.sportInfo
    },
    raw_json: item.json
  }
}));

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO personal.metrics (domain, metric_date, source, metrics, raw_json)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.domain }}',
  '{{ $json.metric_date }}',
  '{{ $json.source }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.metrics) }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.raw_json) }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (domain, metric_date, source) DO UPDATE SET
  metrics = EXCLUDED.metrics,
  raw_json = EXCLUDED.raw_json;
